_comment: Sample input payloads for the openai-image-create activity. Each top-level key is a scenario you can copy into a Flogo flow's input mapper or use with a test harness. DALL·E 2 and DALL·E 3 were deprecated by OpenAI on May 12, 2026 and are no longer supported — use gpt-image-* models.

gpt_image_minimal.prompt: A cute baby sea otter floating on its back

gpt_image_mini_auto._description: gpt-image-1-mini with auto size and quality.
gpt_image_mini_auto.prompt: An ultra-detailed cinematic photo of a snow leopard on a Himalayan ridge at sunrise

gpt_image_transparent_png._description: GPT image model producing a transparent PNG. Background=transparent requires outputFormat png or webp.
gpt_image_transparent_png.prompt: A flat-design app icon of a paper airplane, centered, no shadow

gpt_image_compressed_webp._description: GPT image model with WebP output and 80% compression. outputCompression only applies to webp/jpeg.
gpt_image_compressed_webp.prompt: A pastel watercolor of a coastal village at dusk

gpt_image_2_arbitrary_size._description: gpt-image-2 supports arbitrary WxH (multiples of 16, AR 1:3-3:1, max 3840x2160).
gpt_image_2_arbitrary_size.prompt: A wide cinematic landscape of glowing mushrooms in an enchanted forest

user_tagged._description: Minimal request with an end-user identifier for abuse monitoring.
user_tagged.prompt: A simple line drawing of a coffee cup

_invalid_examples._description: These payloads are intentionally INVALID and will be rejected by validateInput. Useful for negative tests.

deprecated_dalle._why: DALL·E 2/3 were deprecated by OpenAI on May 12, 2026 and are no longer accepted

transparent_with_jpeg._why: background=transparent requires outputFormat png or webp
